corrections.text: In the Analysis section the article states the combination "clearly outperformed ruxolitinib on spleen shrinkage." The underlying data are accurate (SVR35 49.8% vs 28.0% at week 24; p<0.0001), but the word "clearly" is mildly emphatic phrasing; the neutral statement is that the combination achieved a statistically significant higher spleen-response rate than ruxolitinib alone.
